languages.original_text: "There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."

languages.text: "Есть многие знания, леди-навигатор, которым не должно смущать и тревожить пытливые молодые умы. Рубедо, созерцаемое вами, лишь осколок прошлого, который отпечатался в моей памяти. Он не имеет полезности, а следовательно, незначителен".

"There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."
languages.original_text: "Есть многие знания, леди-навигатор, которым не должно смущать и тревожить пытливые молодые умы. Рубедо, созерцаемое вами, лишь осколок прошлого, который отпечатался в моей памяти. Он не имеет полезности, а следовательно, незначителен".

traits.locale_text: "There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."

"There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."

"There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."

languages.text: «Hay muchos conocimientos, lady Navegante, que no deberían confundir ni perturbar las jóvenes mentes inquisidoras. El rubedo que observa es solo un fragmento del pasado grabado en mi memoria. No cumple ningún propósito útil, y, por tanto, es insignificante».
languages.original_text: "There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."

traits.locale_text: «Hay muchos conocimientos, lady Navegante, que no deberían confundir ni perturbar las jóvenes mentes inquisidoras. El rubedo que observa es solo un fragmento del pasado grabado en mi memoria. No cumple ningún propósito útil, y, por tanto, es insignificante».

languages.text: 「ナビゲーター殿、好奇心旺盛な若き精神を惑わせ、乱すべきでない知識というものが、数多くあるのです。あなたが目にしているルベドは、私の記憶に刻まれた過去の断片にすぎません。それは何ら有用な目的を果たさず、ゆえに取るに足らぬものです」
languages.original_text: "There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."

traits.locale_text: 「ナビゲーター殿、好奇心旺盛な若き精神を惑わせ、乱すべきでない知識というものが、数多くあるのです。あなたが目にしているルベドは、私の記憶に刻まれた過去の断片にすぎません。それは何ら有用な目的を果たさず、ゆえに取るに足らぬものです」

languages.text: “导航者女士，有许多知识不应去迷惑和困扰求知若渴的年轻心灵。你所看到的赧红不过是烙印在我记忆中的一段关于过去的碎片。它没有任何实用价值，因此无关紧要。”
languages.original_text: "There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."

traits.locale_text: “导航者女士，有许多知识不应去迷惑和困扰求知若渴的年轻心灵。你所看到的赧红不过是烙印在我记忆中的一段关于过去的碎片。它没有任何实用价值，因此无关紧要。”

languages.text: "Es gibt so viel Wissen, Lady Navigator, das sollte einen neugierigen jungen Verstand aber nicht verwirren und stören. Der Rubedo, den Ihr seht, ist nur ein Fragment der in meine Erinnerung eingebrannten Vergangenheit. Er erfüllt keinen nützlichen Zweck und ist somit unwichtig."
languages.original_text: "There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."

traits.locale_text: "Es gibt so viel Wissen, Lady Navigator, das sollte einen neugierigen jungen Verstand aber nicht verwirren und stören. Der Rubedo, den Ihr seht, ist nur ein Fragment der in meine Erinnerung eingebrannten Vergangenheit. Er erfüllt keinen nützlichen Zweck und ist somit unwichtig."

languages.text: « La connaissance comporte certains aspects qui ne doivent pas semer la confusion dans les jeunes esprits, dame navigatrice. Le rubedo que vous observez n'est qu'un fragment du passé imprimé dans ma mémoire. Il ne remplit aucune fonction, il est donc insignifiant. »
languages.original_text: "There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."

traits.locale_text: « La connaissance comporte certains aspects qui ne doivent pas semer la confusion dans les jeunes esprits, dame navigatrice. Le rubedo que vous observez n'est qu'un fragment du passé imprimé dans ma mémoire. Il ne remplit aucune fonction, il est donc insignifiant. »

languages.text: "Meraklı genç zihinleri kafa karıştırmaması ve rahatsız etmemesi gereken pek çok bilgi var Leydi Rotacı. Gördüğünüz o kırmızılık, sadece hafızamda yer etmiş geçmişin bir parçası. Hiçbir faydalı amaca hizmet etmiyor ve bu yüzden önemsiz."
languages.original_text: "There is much knowledge, Lady Navigator, that should not confuse and disturb inquisitive young minds. The rubedo you behold is but a fragment of the past that is imprinted on my memory. It serves no useful purpose, and is therefore insignificant."

traits.locale_text: "Meraklı genç zihinleri kafa karıştırmaması ve rahatsız etmemesi gereken pek çok bilgi var Leydi Rotacı. Gördüğünüz o kırmızılık, sadece hafızamda yer etmiş geçmişin bir parçası. Hiçbir faydalı amaca hizmet etmiyor ve bu yüzden önemsiz."
